SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-25-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO AUG-27-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF LINDA WILSON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT AXIS FEE OWNER LLC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY MELVIN HOLLOWAY II, WATERBENIL COMMUNITY MANAGER. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR A PAYMENT TO THE PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE NEXT HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
REMARK: RETURN MAIL- CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO AXIS FEE OWNER, LLC-NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED/RETURN TO SENDER

ORDER CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT. CONINUED TO SEP-17-2021 AT 1:30 P.M. NO APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED. IF NO APPEARANCE, CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILSON, LINDA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-27-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO SEP-17-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF LINDA WILSON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT AXIS FEE OWNER, LLC, REPRESENTED BY MELVIN HOLLOWAY, MANAGER IS PRESENT. PARTIES PRESENT REPRESENT TO THE COURT THAT SETTLEMENT PAYMENT HAS BEEN MAILED. PARTIES REQUEST A CONTINUANCE TO ALLOW PLAINTIFF TO RECEIVE PAYMENT FROM DEFENDANT BY MAIL. NO APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED IF PAYMENT IS RECEIVED, AND THAT CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. IF TERMS OF THE AGREEMENT ARE NOT MET, APPEARANCES ARE REQUIRED, AND JUDGMENT WILL BE ISSUED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-17-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO OCT-20-2021 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF LINDA WILSON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT AXIS FEE OWNER, LLC IS PRESENT, MELVIN HOLLOWAY, MANAGER. THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT HAS NOT BEEN MET AS YET THERE IS A HOLD UP WITH THE CHECK PROCESSING. THE REPRESENTATIVE FOR AXIS FEE OWNER IS CURRENTLY WORKING ON GETTING THE PAYMENT PROCESSED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
REMARK: RETURN MAIL RECD 9/17/21. CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO AXIS FEE OWNER-RETURN TO SENDER/NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED
